reasoning: Target book metadata uses mixed/title case text, comma-separated genres as plain strings, and integer year/page fields already matching source dtypes. ID and isbn_clean are preserved. Amazon author shows visible casing issues (e.g. A.S. BYATT) so title-casing is applied there; titles may contain HTML entities but no supported transform exists, so only whitespace trimming is used. Goodreads/metabooks mostly already match target style; only safe whitespace normalization is added for text fields that align with target formatting.
